name: SweetCrust Bakery Portal
cardSummary: A comprehensive customer portal for SweetCrust Bakery enabling online orders, delivery tracking, and customer relationship management. It streamlined order operations, reduced manual coordination effort, and improved visibility across the full customer delivery lifecycle.

name: Power Apps Incident Management
techStack: Model-Driven Apps, Dataverse, Power Automate, Power BI
cardSummary: Enterprise incident management system built on Dynamics 365 platform for a mining company with real-time dashboards and automated escalations. It improved response coordination, reduced administrative overhead, and strengthened operational risk visibility across teams.

name: Power BI Sales Analytics
techStack: Power BI, Power Query, DAX, Excel
cardSummary: Advanced analytics dashboard providing sales leadership with real-time insights into pipeline, forecast, and revenue metrics. It reduced reporting effort, improved forecast confidence, and enabled faster decision-making from a single trusted data view.

name: Azure API & Logic Apps Integration
techStack: Azure Functions, Logic Apps, Azure Service Bus, C#
cardSummary: Microservices architecture for integrating legacy ERP systems with modern cloud applications using Azure serverless components.
